---
title: "Experience"
---

<div class="experience-page">

<h1 class="experience-title">Experience</h1>

<p class="experience-intro">
Selected internship experiences across consulting, investment analysis, and securities research.
</p>

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-year">2024</div>
<div class="timeline-card">

<h2>Consulting Internship</h2>
<div class="experience-meta">Moore</div>

<p>
Worked on client-oriented consulting projects involving financial analysis, accounting, risk management, and sustainable investment topics.
</p>

<div class="experience-tags">
<span>Consulting</span>
<span>Risk Management</span>
<span>Financial Analysis</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-year">2023</div>
<div class="timeline-card">

<h2>Investment Research Intern</h2>
<div class="experience-meta">Deyu Family Office</div>

<p>
Supported investment research and financial analysis in a family office setting, with exposure to portfolio management and sustainable investment considerations.
</p>

<div class="experience-tags">
<span>Family Office</span>
<span>Investment Research</span>
<span>Portfolio Analysis</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-year">2023</div>
<div class="timeline-card">

<h2>Market Research and Financial Analysis Intern</h2>
<div class="experience-meta">HuaFu Securities</div>

<p>
Supported ETF-related market research and financial analysis, with exposure to ETF product structures, market trends, and investment research workflows.
</p>

<div class="experience-tags">
<span>Securities</span>
<span>Market Research</span>
<span>Financial Analysis</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
